subject: feat(duplicates): extend semantic duplicate detection to arcs
body:
Arc deduplication now uses sentence-transformer embeddings instead of
title-based matching. Arc matching groups by source→target endpoint pair,
then compares embeddings within each group. The duplicate scanner also
finds and merges duplicate connections alongside duplicate items.

- Add ArcEmbedding type and DB v7 migration with arcEmbeddings table
- Add buildArcText, computeArcEmbedding, batch/transient arc embedding functions
- Add findSimilarArcPairs (endpoint-grouped pairwise) and findTopArcMatches
- Rewrite mergeService arc matching: status unified to 'new' | 'match' with matchScore
- Add ArcEmbeddingMaps interface; buildSemanticMergeProposal accepts optional arc embeddings
- Update ImportModal to compute arc embeddings during smart matching step
- Update MergeReview with arc match sections showing score bars
- Complete DuplicateScannerModal arc pair rendering, merge UI, and dismiss actions
- Rewrite arc tests for semantic matching API (287 tests pass)
- Auto-embedding subscribes to arc:created, arc:updated, arc:deleted events

Tags: semantic-duplicates, arcs, embeddings, import, scanner
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: semantic-duplicate-detection
Semver: minor
